title: The Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority Act, 1985
full_text: The Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority Act, 1985 कृषि और प्रसंस्कृत खाद्य उत्पाद निर्यात विकासप्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 1985 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198602 Act Number: 02 Enactment Date: 1986-01-08 Act Year: 1986 Short Title: The Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority Act, 1985 Hindi Title: कृषि और प्रसंस्कृत खाद्य उत्पाद निर्यात विकासप्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 1985 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of an Authority for the development and promotion of exports of certain agricultural and processed food products and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Commerce Enforcement Date: 13-02-1986 Notification: 13th February, 1986, vide notification No. S.O. 55(E), dated 13th February, 1986, see Gazette of India, 1986, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to amend Schedule. Section 4. Establishment and constitution of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Salary and Allowances and other conditions of service of Chairman and allowances of members. Section 6. Chairman to be chief executive. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Secretary of the Authority and other staff. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Special provision for transfer of employees to the Authority. Section 9. Committees of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Functions of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 10A. Functions in respect of Special products, etc. Section 11. Power to supersede the Authority. Section 12. Registration of exporters. Section 13. Application, cancellation, fee payable and other matters relating to registration. Section 14. Returns to be made by exporters. Section 15. Grants or loans by the Central Government. Section 16. Constitution of Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Fund. Section 17. Borrowing powers of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Accounts and audit. Section 19. Power to prohibit or control imports and exports of Scheduled products. Section 20. Directions by the Central Government. Section 21. Returns and reports. Section 22. Penalty for making false reports. Section 23. Penalties for obstructing a member or officer of the Authority in the discharge of his duty and for failure to produce books and records. Section 24. Other penalties. Section 25. Offences by companies. Section 26. Jurisdiction of court. Section 27. Previous sanction of the Central Government. Section 28. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 29. Power to delegate. Section 30. Suspension of operation of this Act. Section 31. Application of other laws not barred. Section 32. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 33. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 34. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament. Section 35. Validation. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE.
